_fixture_notes: Case 14: Placeholder parser edges. Step content includes valid {NNNN} placeholders alongside several near-miss forms: {1} (one digit), {01} (two digits), {00001} (five digits), {0001 } (trailing space inside braces), {ABCD} (non-numeric), {note} and {adjust} (literal text). Under a strict /\{[0-9]{4}\}/ regex none of the near-misses should resolve; under a lenient parser some may. This fixture should pass strict validation but probes parser leniency. All ingredient IDs that DO need to resolve are present (0001-0004).
name: Probe Recipe — Placeholder Edges
description: Step content stress-tests the placeholder parser with near-miss forms alongside valid placeholders.

steps.title: Warm the oil — near-miss padding
steps.content: Heat {0001} in a pan. Wrong-padding probes follow: a one-digit ref {1}, a two-digit ref {01}, and a five-digit ref {00001} — none should resolve under a strict parser.

steps.title: Add aromatics — near-miss whitespace and non-numeric
steps.content: Add {0002} and {0003}. Near-miss forms in this step: a trailing-space form {0001 } (note the space inside the braces) and a non-numeric form {ABCD} — neither should resolve.

steps.title: Crisp the bread — literal-text braces
steps.content: Add {0004} and toss to coat. Watch carefully {note: heat varies} and {adjust} as needed — the words 'note' and 'adjust' inside braces are deliberately literal text, not placeholders.

notes: Edge-case probe — not intended to be cooked.
